events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Selects the survivor unit and computes valid move tiles

events.name: TILE_CLICK
events.description: Gathers an adjacent resource, or moves the survivor to a valid tile

events.name: BUILD_CAMP
events.description: Builds the camp (campfire + tent) once wood/stone goals are met

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Called when the match ends in victory or defeat

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Resets the board after victory or defeat

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial resource nodes (3 trees for wood, 3 rocks for stone).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: 6x6 wilderness grid — grass with a river column and a cliff corner.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Turn Budget
overridableConfigKeys.description: Energy ticks allowed before defeat if the camp is not yet built
